name: Community Feed
description: Social community feed with posts, discussions, reactions, comments, and a member directory. Drives engagement and connection in event and community platforms.

page_briefs.feed: Scrollable community feed with a compose box at the top for new posts. Below, a post list displays user posts with avatars, timestamps, text content, images, and inline emoji reaction bars. A sidebar activity feed shows recent community highlights and trending discussions.
page_briefs.post-detail: Single post view with the full post content at the top, followed by a threaded comment section with nested replies, user avatars, and timestamps. Inline emoji reaction bars appear on both the post and individual comments. A reply input anchors at the bottom.
page_briefs.members: Member directory displayed as a content card grid. Each card shows a member avatar, display name, bio excerpt, join date, and contribution count. Search and filter controls at the top allow filtering by role or activity level.

shells.top-nav-main: Top navigation bar with main content area
